title: laurus azorica
intro: Laurus azorica, also known as the Azores laurel or Principe's laurel, is a species of evergreen tree endemic to the island of São Jorge in the Azores archipelago. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Laurus azorica have been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory problems, while its extracts have been used to create herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and infusions. Furthermore, the plant's essential oils have been used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
